profile.subtitle:
Have a project in mind in the field of game or software development ?
Do not hesitate to contact me by phone or email !
profile.column-2-head: Mastery of multiple project management and office tools including...

portfolio.description: My portfolio is filled with the projects I have been able to carry out, alone or in teams, during my digital engineering studies at Télécom SudParis, as a school or personal project. You will mainly find video games in this section!
portfolio.warning: Warning: The projects might not load correctly, please refresh the page if that's the case.

about.p1:
Hello and welcome to my portfolio ! My name is Adrien Schroedel, passionate about software and game development, I managed to join a digital engineer school (Télécom SudParis) to become one...
Throughout my training, I participated (and still participating) in many video game creation projects.
about.p2: My pleasure comes not only from bringing my expertise on the most used game engines on the market, but also from harmoniously collaborating with a multidisciplinary team to offer a work worthy of the 10th art to all types of audiences.
about.p3: My dream is to join an ambitious team sharing strong values and an extraordinary cohesion. As long as motivation is present, I think we can accomplish wonders.

contact.subtitle:
A question in a particular field such as video games, software or even something else ?
Engage the discussion, I will be happy to discuss it with you !
